description: Immerse yourself in the serene beauty of Nikko and the rejuvenating hot springs of Kinugawa. This two-day family adventure will take you through Japan's rich history, stunning natural landscapes, and the warm embrace of its famous onsen. Perfect for families, this trip balances exploration with relaxation, ensuring that both kids and adults create unforgettable memories together.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your hotel, featuring local Japanese dishes that will energize you for a day of exploration.

Visit the magnificent Toshogu Shrine, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Marvel at the intricate carvings and the famous 'see no evil, hear no evil, speak no evil' monkeys, which will surely delight the kids!
Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant specializing in yuba (tofu skin), a specialty of Nikko. It's a unique experience that the whole family will enjoy!
Take a scenic drive to Lake Chuzenji, where you can enjoy stunning views of the surrounding mountains. It's a perfect spot for a family picnic or a leisurely stroll along the lakeside.
Visit Kegon Falls, one of Japan's most beautiful waterfalls. You can take an elevator down to the viewing platform for an up-close view of the cascading water, a thrilling experience for the kids!
Relax and unwind at a traditional onsen ryokan. Enjoy the soothing hot springs and the beautiful natural surroundings, perfect for a family retreat.
Savor a traditional kaiseki dinner at your ryokan, featuring seasonal ingredients and local specialties. A delightful way to end your day!

transit.memo: Take a local bus or taxi to Kinugawa Onsen for a relaxing day.

activities.description: Start your day by soaking in the soothing waters of Kinugawa Onsen. This hot spring area is perfect for families, offering various ryokans and public baths with beautiful views of the river and mountains.
Enjoy a traditional Japanese lunch at a local ryokan. Savor seasonal ingredients and local specialties, providing a delightful culinary experience for the whole family.

Visit Tobu World Square, a theme park featuring miniature replicas of famous landmarks from around the world. It's a fun and educational experience for children, allowing them to explore the world in one place.
After an exciting afternoon, return to your ryokan or a public bath to relax in the onsen once more. The warm waters will help you unwind and rejuvenate after a day of exploration.
Enjoy dinner at a local restaurant, where you can try more of the delicious regional cuisine. Look for dishes featuring fresh river fish or seasonal vegetables.

activities.activity: Evening Stroll Along the Kinugawa River
activities.description: End your day with a peaceful evening stroll along the Kinugawa River. The serene atmosphere and beautiful night views make it a perfect way to conclude your family day.
